banner.body: Essential cookies keep the storefront working. Analytics, marketing, and preference cookies stay off unless you allow them.

settings.title: Cookie preferences
settings.description: Choose which optional cookies AMAMBRA may use. Essential cookies are always active for cart, checkout, security, and core storefront behavior.

essential.title: Essential
essential.body: Required for cart persistence, checkout handoff, account sessions, fraud prevention, accessibility preferences, and consent records.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Helps AMAMBRA understand page performance, product discovery, and storefront quality after explicit consent.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.body: Allows future campaign measurement, retargeting, and partner pixels only after explicit consent.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: Stores optional storefront preferences such as locale, fit display, and shopping experience refinements.

page.title: Cookie policy
page.intro: Consent structure for analytics, marketing, and essential ecommerce cookies.
page.essentialBody: Required for cart persistence, checkout security, account sessions, and fraud prevention.
page.analyticsBody: Analytics should load only after consent. The codebase includes a structure for consent-aware analytics integration.
page.marketingBody: Marketing pixels and retargeting tags should remain disabled until explicit consent is granted.
page.preferencesBody: Preference cookies support optional storefront choices such as locale, experience refinements, and consent-aware personalization.
